---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for SightX
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''

---

## Problem Statement
A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.
Example: "As a clinician, I need to ___ because ___."

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature or change you'd like to see implemented.

## Service Area
Which part(s) of SightX would this affect?

- [ ] Frontend (UI / UX)
- [ ] Backend (API / Logic)
- [ ] Inference Engine (AI / ML Pipeline)
- [ ] Database / Auth (Supabase)
- [ ] DevOps / Docker
- [ ] Documentation

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've thought about.

## Clinical Impact
If this feature affects the diagnostic workflow, AI output, or patient-facing data, please describe the clinical implications.

- **Patient safety considerations**: [e.g., none / could affect risk classification]
- **Data privacy considerations**: [e.g., none / involves patient identifiers]

## Mockups / References
If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, screenshots, or links to similar implementations.

## Additional Context
Any other context, constraints, or technical notes about the request.
